description: Google Identity Platform's Identity Toolkit service provides authentication and user-management APIs for applications, including sign-in flows, account operations, tenant management, and project configuration. The service is hosted at identitytoolkit.googleapis.com as versioned REST endpoints.
summary: identitytoolkit.googleapis.com exposes two REST API surfaces: Identity Toolkit v1 and v2 over HTTPS; both require authentication, with v1 supporting API key or Google OAuth 2.0 access token on some methods and v2 using Google OAuth 2.0 access tokens.
